reasoning: LEFT peers are clearly out-of-tone: steel-grey medieval helmets with realistic proportions and cold desaturated palettes — grimdark/dungeon-crawler register, hard fail against target. RIGHT candidate (4x tower/pillar) avoids the worst grimdark sins: no dark steel, no gore, no edginess. However it reads as generic utilitarian RPG architecture rather than warm fairy-tale toy-diorama. The blue-teal palette is cool rather than bright/warm/sunny; there is no visual whimsy, no charm cue, no Hyrulean warmth or Nintendo-family-friendly delight. It would not look out of place in a generic mobile dungeon crawler. Not a fail, but it needs warmer hues, more personality/silhouette charm, and a clear diorama-toy quality to fully pass the Echoes/BotW-Echoes tone bar.
